title: A Ton of Grass Goes to Pot

sources.title: Pot! Parents! Police!( 1972)
sources.description: A lonely kid meets a hippie couple who introduce him to booze and pot. He gets into trouble at home and with the law.

metadata.Plot: Friends who plan to smuggle a ton of marijuana from Mexico to the US don't realize what a job it will be. They must contend with the crooked double-crosser who sold them the weed, the harsh environment of the Mexican desert, ,the group of black bikers who think the weed is theirs, and the Mexican police who are in hot pursuit.
metadata.Actors: Hal Reed, Tom Johnigarn, Oliver Aubrey
